clean_text:
Gold Secured Loans
Details URL: https://www.inecobank.am/en/Individual/consumer-loans/gold-pledge-secured
[Section: Gold Secured Loans]
Apply for gold secured loans in Inecobank’s branches within several minutes by choosing the most convenient option that takes into consideration your financial needs.
[Section: Loans on favorable terms]
We offer gold secured loans on attractive terms. Apply for a loan of up to 5 000 000 AMD without a commission and a monthly service fee with a maturity period convenient for you.
[Section: Fast loan provision]
Apply and get a loan within several minutes. The loan will be provided to you immediately after the valuation of the gold by the jeweler-expert of the Bank.
[Section: A convenient option for you]
To provide more customer-centric products and services, Inecobank offers both equal and non-equal repayment schedules for gold secured loans. Our financial advisors will help you find the most convenient repayment option based on your financial needs. Apply now!
Updated as of 20.03.2026 09:51
